title: Mission to The Wheel
content:
{{Top|leg|title=Mission to The ''Wheel''}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Mission |prev=*[[Hunt for the Decimator]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *[[Dark Reaper crisis]] |conc= |next=[[First Battle of Kamino]] |image=[[File:AaylaQuin-wheel.jpg]] |name=Mission to The ''Wheel'' |conflict=[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] |objective=Rendezvous with [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] |date=[[22 BBY/Legends|21.83 BBY]] (2 [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]]) |place=[[The Wheel/Legends|The ''Wheel'']] |result=*Republic victory **The Republic finds out the Confederacy plans to attack [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] |side1=[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]
[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |side2=[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1= |commanders2= |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |ppl1=*[[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] *[[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] *[[Khaleen Hentz/Legends|Khaleen Hentz]] *[[Tookarti]] |ppl2=*[[Grakko]]† *[[Zenex]]† |ppl3= |ppl4= |casual1=None |casual2=*Zenex *Grakko *Any other Mercenaries |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} The '''Mission to The ''Wheel''''' was an operation carried out by [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], and proved invaluable to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. ==Background== Following the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] had [[Quinlan Vos's Separatist spy network|gone undercover]] to learn more about the plans of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. He was not responding to [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Tholme/Legends|Tholme's]] messages, causing concern among the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]]. [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] was sent to investigate. ==The mission== [[File:MissiontotheWheel.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Aayla Secura killing Zenex.]] She met up with Quinlan, who was operating under the alias "Korto Vos," and rendezvoused with [[Khaleen Hentz/Legends|Khaleen Hentz]], who had pick-pocketed a Separatist message from [[Zenex]], a [[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]]. The message was from [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]], who revealed that the Separatists were intending to strike the [[Cloning/Legends|cloning]] facilities on [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]. After killing Zenex, and convincing the [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] meant to intercept the message that his objective had been carried out, they relayed the message to the Republic. ==Aftermath== Back on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] received a message from [[Tookarti]], who told Dooku all that had happened. In truth, Dooku and [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] wanted the Republic to know about the attack, so they could repel the Separatists more easily. Dissention was occurring amongst certain Separatist leaders, and those intending to replace Dooku were behind the attack on Kamino. The [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lords]] wanted the Separatist leaders to be humiliated by their defeat, and at the same time have [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] killed in battle. ==Appearances== *[[Republic 49|''Republic'' 49]] {{1st}} *[[Republic 50|''Republic'' 50]] {{Imo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |pl=Misja na stacji Koło }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Wheel, Mission to The}} [[Category:Battles in the Besh Gorgon system]] [[Category:Missions of the Clone Wars]]
